is_3d_secure.description: Indication for usage of 3-D Secure protocol which also specifies who is liable for the refund of transaction from `fraud` alert. If liability is on the issuer's side (`true`), then the merchant is not responsible for refunding the transaction. If information about the usage of 3-D Secure protocol was not available, this value will be empty. It does not affect the liability of `dispute` alerts.

arn.description: Acquirer Reference Number - transaction ID assigned by merchant's bank acquiring transaction.

allOf.description: Value of transaction for which the alert is raised

transaction_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the transaction, sometimes only date is given (time is set to midnight)

alert_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the transaction, sometimes only date is given (time is set to midnight)

transaction_id.description: ID of the transaction in Nethone system. Returned when the transaction was submitted via Transactions API. If Nethone is not able to match the alert to a single transaction, this value will be empty

transaction_reference.description: Reference of the transaction in the merchant's system. It is value sent via Transactions API in reference field. If Nethone is not able to match the alert to a single transaction, this value will be empty

merchant_reference.description: Reference of the merchant in the payment gateway system. It is value sent via Transactions API in merchant_reference field. It is value sent via Transactions API in reference field. If Nethone is not able to match the alert to a single transaction, this value will be empty

reason_code.description: Code indicating reason of chargeback. It is a code specific for card scheme.

source.description: Number representing alert partner - source of the alert: 1 - Ethoca, 2 - Verifi.

source_id.description: Identifier of the alert received from the alert partner
